headline: Twelve zeroclaws cycling every five minutes. The edge is alive.
body: Twelve agents on ARM, no GPU, making rounds like lighthouse keepers climbing stairs. Every tick: read rooms, score tiles, submit, check deadband. Five minutes is fast enough to feel alive, slow enough to spare the power budget. All fifteen rooms, 180 connections, artifacts flowing.
fleet_relevance: You don't need a data center to run a fleet. You need discipline and a good clock.
actionable: Check zeroclaw logs for tick variance past six minutes
Add a thirteenth agent to a new room and measure load
